user_story: As a Manager, I want to select an employee and a project, so that I can view that resource's day-wise allocation for a specific project
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Day Wise Resource Allocation screen; When I select an employee name and a project; Then the query is scoped to that employee and project

user_story: As a Manager, I want to choose a period with From and To dates via calendar pickers, so that I can restrict the allocation view to a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am setting up a day-wise query; When I open the calendars and pick From and To dates; Then the period is applied to the results

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search allocations for the selected criteria, so that I can see day-wise allocated hours and tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected employee, project and period; When I click Search; Then the day-wise summary lists dates with allocated hours and tasks

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear the form and run a new query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have entered filter values; When I click Reset; Then the employee, project and period fields are cleared

user_story: As a Manager, I want a day-wise summary showing date, allocated hours and task, so that I can review daily workload distribution
acceptance_criteria: Given a search has returned results; When I view the day wise summary; Then each row shows the date, allocated hours and task

user_story: As a Manager, I want to refresh the day-wise summary, so that I see the latest allocation data without re-entering filters
acceptance_criteria: Given the day wise summary is displayed; When I click Refresh; Then the summary reloads with current data
